scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run build:frontends && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.build:frontends: PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/rosie run build && PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/aegis/ pnpm --filter @workspace/aegis run build && PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/beacon/ pnpm --filter @workspace/beacon run build && PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/lutar/ pnpm --filter @workspace/lutar run build && PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/nimbus/ pnpm --filter @workspace/nimbus run build && PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/firestorm/ pnpm --filter @workspace/firestorm run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
